## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation update

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run build` passes locally
- [ ] Manual test completed
- [ ] Screenshots included for UI changes (if applicable)

## Checklist

- [ ] Scope is focused and avoids unrelated changes
- [ ] Docs updated (`README.md` and/or `docs/API.md`) when behavior changed
- [ ] No sensitive data included
